mapper.sql: id, config_id, pack_num, a_capacity, spec, min_voltage_num, start_time, end_time, current, b_capacity, back_up_duration, static_time, map_battery_data, soh
mapper.insert: insert into pre_battery_group(id, config_id, pack_num, a_capacity, spec, min_voltage_num, start_time, end_time, current, b_capacity, back_up_duration, static_time, map_battery_data, soh) values (#{id}, #{configId}, #{packNum}, #{acapacity}, #{spec}, #{minVoltageNum}, #{startTimeStr}, #{endTimeStr}, #{current}, #{bcapacity}, #{backUpDuration}, #{staticTimeStr}, #{mapBatteryData}, #{soh})
mapper.delete:
delete from pre_battery_group where config_id = #{configId}
and pack_num = #{packNum}
